nasb.text: They will bring you down to the pit, And you will die the death of those who are slain In the heart of the seas.

esv.text: They shall thrust you down into the pit, and you shall die the death of the slain in the heart of the seas.

cnv.text: 他們必使你下到坑中， 你必被殺害， 死在海的中心。

ccb.text: 使你坠入坟墓， 你必惨死在大海中。
